text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I leave the academy on Valentine's Day to find
Bamboo Memory waiting outside covered in mud.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Happy Valentine's Day, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
These chocolates are to show you my
appreciation for all your hard work every day!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Here you go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to focus on the chocolates, but Bamboo
Memory seems to notice me stealing glances at
her muddied clothes.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, this?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Well, actually, getting these to you was quite the
ordeal!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few hours earlier...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Phew... I've finally made it. The Hidden Gem
certainly lives up to its name!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But people say their chocolates are so delicious,
they'll bring a tear to your eye—chocolates
everyone should try at least once in their life!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If the rumors are true, then... hehe! I sure can't
wait to see the look on Trainer's face!

text_block_list.name: Boar
text_block_list.text: Snort, snort... Grumble!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: A boar?! Yikes! What's a boar doing h—

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait! Are you trying to take my chocolates?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't pull on them!
Give them back! Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Graaahhh! There's no WAY I'm letting you have
these chocolates! Shoo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ack, now the packaging is all messed up! I'm
gonna have to rewrap them...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle, rustle!

text_block_list.name: Monkey
text_block_list.text: Ooh, ooh, ooh! Eeek!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Now there's a monkey?! These chocolates even
entices animals... They really do live up to the
hype!

text_block_list.name: Boar
text_block_list.text: Snort! Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You again?! Ugh! You don't give up, do you?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...I've chased around plenty of rule breakers
before, but I'm not used to being on the other
side of the chase.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: ...Looks like I've gotta handle this head-on!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wait for me, Trainerrrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad I managed to get them here!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Um, would you mind trying them right away?! I've
been looking forward to seeing your reaction
more than anything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It appears these are limited-edition chocolates
from a shop called The Hidden Gem. I open the
package to reveal what waits inside...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oooh! So these are Hidden Gem chocolates!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Huh... They look kind of... messy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chocolates inside the box look as though
they've melted.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh nooo! I really did it this time!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I was holding them so tight, they must've melted
from my body heat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm so sorry! This is not at all how I envisioned
this!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Really? But they're so... gloopy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't mind a little melted chocolate. Plus, she
faced all kinds of danger to get these to me, so
I'm definitely going to enjoy them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: You'll really eat them? Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I pick out a piece of chocolate barely holding its
shape and pop it in my mouth... which is soon
enveloped in sweetness! The rich scent of cacao
fills my nostrils!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But it's so messy... Ooh, you're too kind! Thank
you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But as you can see... my appreciation for you
burns bright!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
In fact, it's so intense that it melts chocolate!
Hehe! Careful you don't burn yourself!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems I got more than just chocolate this
Valentine's Day... I also got a taste of Bamboo
Memory's appreciation!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry! I'll fix them!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
No way! They need to be proper chocolates if
they're going to show my appreciation properly!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
All right! I've got this! I just need to put the
chocolate in a mold and let it harden!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
First, I have to melt it some more! Let's get this
bowl in some hot water!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Gotta make some delicious chocolate! Let's
gooooo!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
...Hm, not quite! I've gotta make them even more
delicious! Have some of this! And this! Aaaand
this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splat!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Agh! Now there's chocolate EVERYWHERE!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
There's only enough left for one piece! How could
this have happened?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I can't express my gratitude with just this!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry! I just keep messing it up...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
But... no! I'm not giving up! Even if I can only
make one small piece of chocolate...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm still going to do it right and fill it with all of
my feelings!
choice_data_list: I can't wait to try it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Great! No matter how many tries it takes, I
promise I'll finish it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for the wait! It really is just one piece.
Sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be just one piece, but it has a sense of
warmth and weight to it, almost as if it's packed
with warm feelings.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
H-hey, don't just stare at it like that! Hurry up
and eat it!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but first... Happy Valentine's Day! Again!
...Hehe!
